subcodes.first_line: O pure and confident leaf! Thy services at the Sacred Threshold are accepted and rewarded, and the glances of favour from every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مطمئنه خدماتت در آستان مقدس مقبول و ماجور و لحظات عنایت از هر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
